prompt: A photorealistic image of Sam Altman standing confidently on the left with his hands on his hips, wearing a black t-shirt with white text that reads "i ship faster than you code.". Next to him on the right is Sundar Pichai, looking dejected and sad with his head bowed and hands clasped, wearing a plain dark grey t-shirt. They are standing indoors in front of a large glass window. Outside the window is a sunny corporate campus with trees, a small pond, and a modern glass building with the Google logo prominently displayed on it.
